user.title: API Configuration
user.description: Enter your Claude API key to enable AI-powered medicine label scanning and verification. You can get a key at [console.anthropic.com](https://console.anthropic.com). Leave blank to use the integration without AI features.

data_description.claude_api_key: Your Anthropic Claude API key (optional — enables AI label scanning and verification)

notifications.title: Notification Settings
notifications.description: Configure how and when you receive medicine expiry alerts.

data_description.expiry_warning_days: Warn when medicines expire within this many days (1–30)
data_description.daily_digest: Send a daily summary of expiring and expired medicines
data_description.digest_time: Time of day to send the daily digest
data_description.notification_service: Home Assistant notify service to use (e.g. notify.mobile_app_my_phone)

storage.title: Storage Settings
storage.description: Choose the locations where you store medicines and configure data retention.

data_description.locations: Select all locations where you keep medicines
data_description.auto_cleanup: Automatically remove medicine records older than the retention period
data_description.keep_days: Number of days to retain medicine records (30–365)

defaults.title: Medicine Defaults
defaults.description: Set default values used when adding new medicines.

data_description.default_location: Default storage location pre-filled when adding a new medicine
data_description.default_unit: Default unit of measurement pre-filled for new medicines
data_description.enable_camera: Allow scanning medicine labels using the device camera
data_description.confidence_threshold: Minimum AI confidence score (0–100%) required to auto-accept scan results

error.invalid_api_key: Invalid Claude API key. Please check your key and try again.

abort.already_configured: Medicine Count & Expiry is already configured.

init.title: API Configuration
init.description: Update your Claude API key. Leave blank to keep the existing key or disable AI features.

data_description.claude_api_key: Your Anthropic Claude API key (leave blank to keep the current key)
